think_blocks:
The user wants me to identify all temporal segments where David Muir is visible and identifiable in the video.

1.  **Analyze the video:** I'll scan through the video, looking for David Muir. He is the main anchor, wearing a black shirt, often with a city skyline at night in the background. He also appears in the field reporting from Tel Aviv.

2.  **Identify segments:**
    *   00:01 - 00:17: David Muir is speaking directly to the camera.
    *   00:33 - 00:38: David Muir is walking through a crowd in Tel Aviv.
    *   00:52 - 00:56: David Muir is interviewing a young man in the crowd.
    *   02:05 - 02:33: David Muir is back in the studio setting, speaking to the camera.
    *   03:07 - 03:13: David Muir is speaking to the camera again.
    *   05:28 - 05:33: David Muir is speaking to the camera.
    *   05:45 - 06:00: David Muir is speaking to the camera.
    *   07:51 - 07:55: Split screen with David Muir on the left and Ian Pannell on the right.
    *   07:55 - 08:07: David Muir is speaking to the camera.
    *   08:43 - 08:54: David Muir is speaking to the camera.
    *   08:57 - 09:05: David Muir is walking through the crowd in Tel Aviv again.
    *   09:12 - 09:17: David Muir is speaking to the camera in the crowd.
    *   09:38 - 09:50: David Muir is interviewing a woman and a young man.
    *   10:01 - 10:06: David Muir is interviewing a young woman.
    *   10:10 - 10:15: David Muir is interviewing the same young woman.
    *   10:15 - 10:20: David Muir is interviewing the young man again.
    *   10:26 - 10:30: David Muir is interviewing the young man.
    *   10:33 - 10:44: David Muir is interviewing the young man.
    *   11:09 - 11:40: David Muir is interviewing a man wearing a t-shirt with a hostage's picture.
    *   11:40 - 11:44: David Muir is walking through the crowd.
    *   11:54 - 12:13: David Muir is speaking to the camera.
    *   12:32 - 12:39: David Muir is speaking to the camera.
    *   12:53 - 13:09: David Muir is speaking to the camera.

3.  **Refine timestamps:** I will carefully check the start and end times for each segment to ensure accuracy.

    *   Segment 1: 00:01 - 00:17
